description: Switching cost rates as a percentage of annual spend by category. Applied to net addressable spend to prevent over-stating savings when vendor migration costs are material.

notes.IT: High switching costs driven by data migration, integration re-wiring, retraining and ERP customisation. Core ERP/CBS switches cost 15-20%; SaaS switches 5-8%.
notes.TELECOM: Core network vendor switches (RAN, transmission) carry 10-15% migration costs; enterprise comms 3-5%.
notes.OUTSOURCED: BPO/ITO transitions typically 6-9% of TCV for knowledge transfer, parallel running and stabilisation.
notes.RELATED_PARTY: Exit from related-party arrangements carries legal, transfer pricing and regulatory risk — modelled conservatively at 10%.
notes.GST_TAX: Regulatory payments — no switching cost concept applicable.
notes.CSR: No vendor lock-in; switching cost negligible.
